system.description: Angels are a race of celestials, or good outsiders, native to the good-aligned Outer Planes. Unless otherwise noted, an angel has darkvision 60 ft. and low-light vision; immunity to acid, cold, and petrification; resistance to electricity 10 and fire 10; a +4 racial bonus on saves against poison; a protective aura (like magic circle against evil and lesser globe of invulnerability in a 20 ft. radius, caster level = HD); and constant tongues (as the spell, caster level = HD).
